# @architecture/generate-package-readmes

Generates package-local README files from governed package.json architecture metadata.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @architecture/generate-package-readmes
Version: 0.1.0
Component: generate-package-readmes
Type: tool
System: architecture-governance
Domain: architecture
Bounded context: architecture-governance
Owner: architecture
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: tooling
Class: active.tooling
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: architecture
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Read package architecture metadata
- Render deterministic package README content
- Check generated README freshness
- Write README files only when --write is supplied
- Emit generated self-evidence

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not validate package metadata schema
- Does not generate inventory reports
- Does not create governance evidence

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Run from repository root with node tools/architecture/generate-package-readmes/src/index.mjs --check
- Use --write to update generated README files
